name: playbook
description: Native, invisible-but-visible Claude Code steering layer: task-fit routing across five modes with visible markers, restraint that keeps ultracode from over-reaching for workflows, an always-on Sonnet-execute and Opus-review model rule, a divide-by-ten time rule that stops agents quoting human hours for machine-speed work, calm compaction that stops agents fearing the context limit, and offline notifications via Pushover or ntfy.
